description: Camera, music, typing, puzzles, darts, maps, and reference notes.
empty-source-state: Outline has the page, but no body, links, images, or child pages yet.
no-links: No external links in this source note.
no-feed: No public feed link is attached to this note.
no-typing-profiles: No external typing profiles in the source note.
no-algorithm-sets: No algorithm sets in the source note.
source-pages-attached: Source pages attached. Add Chords, Voicings, or Audio lists for playback.
embed-photo-gallery-description: Images and photo links pulled from the source note.
embed-twitter-feed-description: Public feed links attached to the source note.
embed-rubik-algorithms-description: Move notation and practice links from the source note.
embed-typing-stats-description: Typing profiles and practice links from the source note.
embed-darts-board-description: Board, gear, and practice references from the source note.
embed-link-library-description: External references collected from the source note.
embed-piano-chords-description: Chord, voicing, and audio source pages.
embed-field-notes-description: Source state, related pages, and live note metadata.
source-index-note: This page lists the current source notes as they are. Open a row for links, images, related pages, and the embedded module attached to that note.
empty-description: The source notebook could not be reached. Hobbies will reappear when the connection is restored.
